SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ROGER ROLANDO CERVERA SANSORES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANSORES, ROGER ROLANDO CERVERA $1,218.74 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,333.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
